---
title: "artifact_diagnostic"
author: "Geoffrey Bruder"
date: "2026-05-04"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
# 1. Does the artifacts file exist?
file.exists("artifacts/project_artifacts.RData")

# 2. What objects are inside it?
env <- new.env()
load("artifacts/project_artifacts.RData", envir = env)
sort(ls(envir = env))

# 3. Quick sanity checks on the main objects
if(exists("test_baked", envir = env)) {
  tb <- get("test_baked", envir = env)
  dim(tb); names(tb)[1:30]
  # check predicted probs length
  if(exists("platt_pred", envir = env)) length(get("platt_pred", envir = env))
  if(exists("xgb_pred_prob", envir = env)) length(get("xgb_pred_prob", envir = env))
}

```

```{r}
# 1. List objects inside artifacts
env <- new.env()
load("artifacts/project_artifacts.RData", envir = env)
print(sort(ls(envir = env)))

# 2. Confirm test_baked rows and predicted vector lengths
tb <- get("test_baked", envir = env)
cat("nrow(test_baked) =", nrow(tb), "\n")
if(exists("platt_pred", envir = env)) cat("length(platt_pred) =", length(get("platt_pred", envir = env)), "\n")
if(exists("xgb_pred_prob", envir = env)) cat("length(xgb_pred_prob) =", length(get("xgb_pred_prob", envir = env)), "\n")
if(exists("raw_probs", envir = env)) cat("length(raw_probs) =", length(get("raw_probs", envir = env)), "\n")

```


```{r}


```


```{r}

```
